blog.title: Focused cybersecurity for a small project
blog.description: Using a lightweight threat model to focus security work on a small project — figuring out what's actually worth protecting, and which alerts to safely ignore.

prevBlog.title: Building a Social Media Growth assistant for Under 50 Cents a Month
prevBlog.description: How I built a LangGraph-based social media assistant that generates, queues, and publishes posts to Mastodon and Bluesky — with human approval and a monthly cost of under 50 cents.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A s...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1780780027794
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A small helpful AI assistant sits beside a blogger at a desk. The AI presents a stack of social media post drafts labeled "Draft 1", "Draft 2", "Draft 3". The blogger reviews them with a pen, approving some with green checkmarks and rejecting others with red crosses. On a monitor, a weekly publishing calendar shows scheduled posts. Cozy home-office atmosphere, clean desk, coffee mug, plants, soft daylight through a window. The AI looks helpful and collaborative rather than autonomous. No dystopian robots, no dark colors, no corporate stock-photo style. Professional but approachable."

nextBlog.title: Can quantum physics generate institutions?
nextBlog.description: An example where the quantum prisoner's dilemma hands you a ready-made institution — and the question whether quantum could help generate institutions for harder problems.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Cinematic illustration in the visual style of Breaking Bad. Saul Goodman sits confidently at a l...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1783971722158
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Cinematic illustration in the visual style of Breaking Bad. Saul Goodman sits confidently at a large desk in the center of a dark abstract space, wearing his colorful suit, acting as an institutional mediator rather than a lawyer. On the left and right, Walter White and Jesse Pinkman sit isolated in separate interrogation rooms, unable to communicate. Between Saul and each prisoner float stacks of legal documents connected by glowing lines. Some documents are flipped over, symbolizing strategic choices. Above the scene hover elegant mathematical expressions from game theory mixed with quantum circuit symbols, quantum gates, entanglement notation, and abstract logic diagrams. Thin glowing quantum connections subtly link the two stacks of documents through Saul's desk. The overall composition feels like economics meets quantum physics rather than science fiction. Dramatic cinematic lighting, realistic, highly detailed, muted colors with yellow-green Breaking Bad atmosphere."
